/CAL:JURY TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/LD:05-04-22 (GC COVID)//X:THE COURT RENEWS GOOD CAUSE FINDING OVER DEFENSE OBJECTION/DOPU:POS ACMRPT/CONT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:05-04-22 (30TH DAY)/ACM/CTORD:ACM TO ASSIST DEFENDANT TO ENROLL IN THINKING FOR A CHANGE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:ELLA HERROD/SA2:37 6TH ST,,SF/SAORD3/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CONTACT LAW ENFORCEMENT FOR A CIVIL STANDBY AT 37 6TH ST,,SF/X:ORDER TO PROVIDE POLICE ESCORTFOR CIVIL STANDBY FILED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 04-12-22/CONTD:JURYTRIAL ON 04-20-22/DOP/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAWT/LDTR:05-04-22/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT/DOPC/X:IF NO REPORT SUBMITTED BY ACM/
